summary:
RELIGIOUS STANCE AND END TIMES PREPARATION: Brandon emphasizes the importance of standing firmly on biblical principles during the end times, referencing the unalterable events of Matthew 24. Brandon criticizes modern church leadership for being seeker-friendly and yielding to political correctness, calling for a return to strong, unwavering faith and the true word of God. Brandon asserts that believers possess authority over plagues, sickness, and fear, mentioning specific threats like the Hantavirus, COVID-19, and smallpox. Furthermore, Brandon encourages believers to adopt a courageous mentality to combat demonic forces and societal brainwashing, while emphasizing the need to intercede for the lost in places like Australia and North Korea.

POLITICAL VISIONS AND WARNINGS CONCERNING DONALD TRUMP: Brandon recounts specific visions regarding Donald Trump and the White House. Brandon describes seeing a demonic cloak, identified as an Antichrist spirit, attempting to oppress the president's mind, alongside a cloaked black bird pecking at his brain to influence his thinking. Brandon expresses concern over a Truth Social post where Trump suggested putting his face on the $100 bill and replaced the phrase 'In God We Trust' with 'God Bless Donald Trump,' warning against pride and idol worship. Brandon recalls a vision from January where Jesus indicated Trump is in a 'valley of decision' that will determine his future, while Jezebel and octopus spirits attempt to confuse his mind. Additionally, Brandon foresees Trump traveling to China and across Asia, praying for his protection against assassins and ungodly counsel.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon details several global developments and prophetic visions, including a secret meeting between Barack Obama, Kamala Harris, and a Canadian leader concerning trade and plots. Brandon highlights recent industrial accidents, such as an oil refinery explosion in Mexico and a fatal gas line explosion in Brazil. Regarding the Middle East, Brandon states that Saudi Arabia's Mohammed bin Salman, whom Brandon identifies as the Antichrist, is launching secret strikes against Iran. In Mexico, Brandon describes a CIA operative war on cartels resulting in turf wars, the removal of Claudia Scheinbaum, and the rise of a new, well-dressed leader. Brandon also mentions a Russian submarine carrying nuclear reactors to North Korea that mysteriously sank due to a drone, upsetting Kim Jong-un.

ENVIRONMENTAL CRISES AND WEATHER MANIPULATION: Brandon warns of an impending severe drought comparable to the breaking point of 1610, threatening agriculture and water levels at the Hoover Dam. Brandon states that this could lead to massive electricity shortages for millions of people in California and Nevada by 2027 or 2028. Brandon describes a vision of a new Dust Bowl where farmers abandon their tractors amid blowing dirt. This extreme weather, including massive hail storms and unprecedented tornadoes or hurricanes, is attributed by Brandon to weather warfare and manipulation. In response, Brandon calls upon believers to use their spiritual authority to pray for rain and combat these manipulated environmental threats.

VIRUS PREDICTIONS AND LEGISLATIVE DISTRACTIONS: Brandon discusses a new contagious virus originating in Europe and connected to rodents, viewing it as a trial run for a larger biological event planned by China for 2028 to interfere with elections. Brandon also focuses on upcoming political and financial shifts, noting a transition in the Federal Reserve leadership from Jerome Powell to a new official who will struggle with interest rates and a looming recession. Brandon points out a suspicious legislative maneuver where 300 pages were suddenly added to the Clarity Act just before a vote. Brandon claims that the scheduled release of 46 classified UFO documents by the Pentagon on the exact same day is a deliberate distraction designed to shift public attention away from the implementation of a new systemic control measure.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF DECEPTION AND DEMONIC ENTITIES: Brandon shares profound visions regarding upcoming national celebrations, including Memorial Day and the 250th anniversary of the United States in Washington, D.C. During these visions, Brandon observes a dark omen of skeleton hands clapping over Seattle and Portland, alongside a parlay involving Putin. Brandon sees a mesmerizing, translucent gold and emerald brooch gifted to Trump from foreign nations, which hides a satanic pentagram and a human skull. Brandon connects this jewelry to an impending government disclosure regarding alien files, asserting that these extraterrestrials are actually Nephilim, fallen angels, and demonic lizard entities. Brandon describes these entities as resembling creatures from Star Wars or lizards with dingy black skin and opal-like armor, operating from cave portals containing glowing egg-like stones. Brandon warns that these tier-based disclosures are orchestrated by Satan to trigger a great apostasy and deceive the masses through shock and awe.
rawData: [May 13, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/ZgqApEslE28]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again today. We're going to go right into prayer here pretty quick. I won't keep you very long on the news part. I told Braden, I said, "We got to keep it short." Last night was just way too long. We did it for over an hour and a half, I think, going over everything. Well, we hadn't been with you in three days, and there was so much going on. It was entertaining. I can tell you that I enjoyed part of it. But there are some of you who say, "I just want to pray," so we are going to pray more and more. We have to, because that's our job. It's our calling. That's what I want to say: we need to really push through in the spirit realm. All right. Do you have anything you want to show them, Braden? Yeah. You ready? All right. No, not this one. Keep my song. Okay. Right off the bat, did anybody see the Truth Social post from President Trump today? He posted on Truth Social and he said he wants to put himself on the $100 bill, which he could have been kidding. But what I thought was sad again is, you know, and I'm not picking at this man—I want you to understand—everybody says, "Brandon, you're too hard. You need to say this and that." I'm not a brown-noser. One thing I'm going to tell you, I am not a hiney kisser either. I am a person who is going to stand for what I believe is in the Bible, and we're going to stand with a backbone like a crowbar in these end times, or you're going to get the devil running you right over in your household. There are much more distractions and much more unsettling times coming because we know what the word says, and we can't change the word. The word is going to stand like a pillar in these end times. From Matthew 24, people say, "Brandon, can we pray away Matthew 24?" No. If Jesus said it, it's going to happen. What can you do for you and your house concerning Matthew 24? People say, "Well, Matthew 24, Brandon, scares me." Well, to the unbeliever, it should. But I believe for the believing believer, we have a covenant. We're his kids. We're adopted into his family. He has us in the palm of his hand. And I believe with all my heart that we can take communion. We can take our authority. We anoint our house with oil when it comes to plagues. The Hantavirus, Havana, whatever it is. Yeah. To COVID to whatever, smallpox, whatever. I believe with all my heart that Jesus Christ paid the price for us to walk in victory over everything. Sickness, disease, poverty, lack; he took it all. That Jesus Christ paid the price for all of everything once and for all. We are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. The moment you accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior, he dwells on the inside of you. And as he is, so are we in this world. You go, "Well, I don't believe that." Well, that's your problem. I believe it. Well, what happens if I get it and I die? Well, to be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. We have victory. We go from glory to glory. If you go out believing, you go out believing strong. But at least you can say I was on the victory side of believing instead of being a doubting Thomas and saying, "Well, everything's going; the sky is falling, Chicken Little." And I'm telling you, it's going to take some men and women that have that David mentality: "Who is this uncircumcised Philistine that he tries to defy the armies of the living God?" I'm going to take that giant's head. And if we have that kind of mentality in these last days with that backbone, we're going to see some victory. I just believe it. Well, we haven't seen it before. Well, because you have a bunch of limp-wristed metrosexual men running our churches with skinny jeans and fog machines. You got a bunch of limp-wristed metrosexual sissies that don't have no testosterone up in your churches running them. And until you get a backbone like a crowbar and stand against what the devil's trying to do and teach your family how to stand against the devil and all the ways he's trying to do out there in the world with all this seeker-friendly garbage that we hear on the news and all this other stuff. Well, I don't know what I relate myself to be. The political correctness is destroying our culture, and all the things that we see on the news is destroying our culture. They're desensitizing you and they're brainwashing you to believe something that is not the word of God. And people are taking it like a Hoover vacuum cleaner and sucking it up and going, "Well, that's all right. We'll make it a doctrine in the church." And the only thing that's ever going to deliver you in these last days is the true word of God, this Bible, not anything altered, not anything that's going to be added to or taken away from. We read it right out of the book and we walk it by faith. We live by faith and not by sight. We stand for what the word says, and we go by what the word says, and we do what the word says, and we keep doing it. And faith comes by hearing and hearing by the word of God. And that's the only way you're going to get through these end times and these last days. I pray Jesus comes back in September and it'll be the month to remember, you know, the rhyme. But I believe that we have some things to do yet. I believe there's a lot of souls that need to be saved as we were travailing for them last night, praying for the lost in Australia, praying for the lost in North Korea, etc. There's a lot of people that are going to hell if they die tonight. And the Lord doesn't want any of us to perish, but all come to repentance. And there's so many people that are just so limp-wristed, so weak in their faith and they don't even know how much Jesus did for them and what he did for them for you to walk in victory. You don't have to be down and out and have the devil running you ragged. The devil's chasing you all over. You should be chasing the devil. We have the power and authority. The same power that raised Jesus Christ from the dead dwells on the inside of you. Either you believe it or you don't. I'm fully persuaded that what God has promised in his word, he is able also to perform it. And so we see all these things going on. What did I tell you I saw in the White House? I saw a demonic covering trying to come over like a cloak onto our president. That fly is going to—I'm going to slap that fly. Get out of here. I saw a demonic covering trying to come over our president and the Lord said that is the Antichrist spirit trying to oppress, trying to come on him to mess with his thinking. Then I saw a bird that was cloaked and it was black, a black bird in a cage and it would hide himself and it would peck his brain. Hide himself and it was peck his brain and it was messing with him and I saw it in the oval office and the Lord said it's trying to influence his thinking. Then I said there's a dark thing coming which is the king. He came a couple about a week ago and the Lord said pray there's alliances. There's things being said. A couple weeks later, the other man that's over England is resigning. Why? What happened? Why is he all of a sudden quitting? Do we have an explanation for that? Not yet. So then we see gold statues being brought up next. Well, Brandon, it's okay. You know, Abraham Lincoln had a statue. Well, after he was dead, he did. And it wasn't a golden idol. It wasn't a golden statue. I don't try to get, you know, I don't want to put a devil behind every bush, but I told you to refrain from the presence of evil, to stay away from it. Now, what happened today is: are we going to keep, as believing believers, and not hear what we're seeing on the wall and ignore it, or will you take it and really start interceding for this man? I know there's a lot of you that haven't, and I'm not fussing at you. I'm trying to say there has to be some reality. Don't drink the Kool-Aid. Look at the people who drank the Kool-Aid. Remember them? They were in the occult. Remember the guy? He had them all drink the Kool-Aid and they didn't make it. They were all poisoned. They all drank the Kool-Aid; they found their bodies everywhere. Do you remember who that was? It was back in the 80s. Trump puts out this thing—well, this is the part that bothered me. And God bless Donald Trump, but instead of 'In God We Trust' on our real $100 bill, President Trump put 'God Bless Donald Trump,' not 'In God We Trust.' He put his face on there, and I thought, 'Okay, we can handle that.' But you took off 'In God We Trust' and put 'God Bless Donald Trump' on your Truth Social. So you're thinking about you; it's no more about America anymore, sir. You put 'God Bless Donald Trump,' and we pray for God to bless you, sir, but it's about God blessing America. 'In God We Trust.' We trust in Him, not in you. And it isn't about God blessing you only and putting you on the currency. And you're putting that on your Truth Social. I love you; we pray for you all the time. But this is the pride that I'm talking about that the Lord keeps warning us about over and over. We are praying for you. I am told your secretary watches us; we pray for you. I am not against you. I love you, I pray for you. But this is the stuff I'm talking about, from the Jesus picture and all that. Well, this is the third or fourth thing in less than a month. And people are going to go, 'Well, it's all right. God bless Donald Trump instead of In God We Trust; we can just kind of bypass that.' Again, I am not a brown-noser. I'm going to tell you, we pray for you. Please keep yourself humble before the Lord. God will not share His glory with anyone. I don't care if you're the most powerful man in the world or if you've got the most power; God will not share His glory with anyone. And the church must humble themselves and seek only Jesus because the only person who's going to save America is Jesus Christ. An awakening unto God is the only thing that's going to save America. Donald Trump is a man, and God can use him. But we have to keep the main thing the main thing. We pray for humility; we pray for God to keep His hand on this man because I believe He has things for him to do. But Jesus stood right there in my house and He warned me about this in January, and I got so persecuted from the church because everybody's drinking the Kool-Aid. And I say, 'Don't drink the Kool-Aid.' Pray for him because there's a demonic covering trying to come over this man. And the Lord said—Jesus said, as He stood right there with three angels—'I'm holding the church accountable on how they pray for him.' He's going through the valley of decision right now. What he decides—and there was a great storm on one side and a great, beautiful valley with green on the other side—He said he can choose where he's at right now and the decisions he makes for the rest of his term. This will either make him or break him, five months into it now of this year. I'm trying to be... like I said, I'm probably not the most politically correct person you'll ever hear because I'm all about Jesus. I'm sold out. I have tasted and I have seen that the Lord is good. And there is no man, there is no idol, there's no dollar bill—there's nothing that will ever take the place of my Lord Jesus Christ. And I'm fearful for what I see in the church, for they are asleep. And the Lord said, 'I'm bringing a great shaking to awaken, to bring the bride to My side.' In season or out, in season or not, the Lord said it all comes out of the spirit to come into the natural. Whatever is in a man's heart, however a man thinks about himself, whatever things he's meditating on, whatever things he's saying out of his mouth... out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks. You can see it because of how it's manifested in the spirit and manifested in the natural; it starts showing up in things like this. This is what the Lord warned us about and He said, 'Pray for him.' So, do we take responsibility for that? Everybody has their own choices to make, but I said we have to carry him across the finish line because he won't make it on his own. He had cement blocks on his feet. I saw the church either pick him up, or he stood there and he wasn't moving. He was trying, but there was a great antichrist. Demonic spirits were coming against him—Jezebel, there are demonic spirits coming against this man. And I saw octopus spirits; I saw tentacles of an octopus trying to wrap around his mind, sending out ink to blot it out so you couldn't see it. So we continue to pray. Next: Obama. Obama had a secret meeting today with the Canadian Prime Minister—president, whatever he is. What did I tell you? I saw about Obama and Canada. Remember that prophetic word? I saw Obama and England and I said the Democrats were talking to Canada and they were devising a plan. Do you remember that? We can bring out the video; I can show you real quick. But I saw something very dark concerning this meeting right here, but the meeting hadn't taken place yet. It was about five or six weeks ago; we saw this in prayer. We saw this meeting and we saw Kamala Harris was involved somehow. Do you remember, Bee? Yes, I do. I remember because I'm seeing it right now, and he's shaking his hand. It was because of the trade and the things that were going on, and I said the Democrats are a part of this. What's happening there? It's part of the coup and the January 6th... keep going. Why is Obama going and meeting with him? He's not even president anymore. Then we have another major oil refinery explode in Mexico today, and it went boom. At least six people were injured after an explosion and fire at a refinery in Mexico. Just mysteriously, another one just goes up. Boom. Just another day in the world, right? It's just normal. All of a sudden, all this is happening. Are y'all letting the elevator go to the top yet? Then, really mysteriously, we have a gas line explode. At least one person was killed and three others were injured. Search dogs were deployed to check for more victims under the rubble. It was in Brazil. They're showing all this on fire. That's not a refinery, son. They said an old pipeline—not an old pipeline. Well, that's probably nothing; that's probably just a residence. Okay, yeah, this one's the refinery. So that's what we'll go with because that's part of it. We had Tulsa, we've had... I mean, in Louisiana, they're all going boom. Next. Saudi Arabia secretly launches strikes against Iran in retaliation for attacks. So MBS, who I said I believe in my opinion is the Antichrist, is attacking Iran. And I said, 'Watch MBS; he'll rise up big time in the days ahead.' Next. Oh yeah, and then they said, 'Exclusive: CIA launches a secret war on cartels with military operative inside Mexico.' Remember, I saw the trucks and I saw military operative. I saw a cartel and what did the Lord show us? That there would be a lot of major leaders in the cartel in the days ahead being taken out. And when they are taken out and this happens, I saw turf wars because they didn't know who was in charge and who wasn't because a lot of members were eliminated in the days ahead. And I saw turf wars and I saw Claudia being taken out of her office and she was dragging her nails across the desk. And I saw a new man that looked like an Antonio Banderas actor. He looked very GQ, very proper. His suit was really nice. He was a nice-looking man. He was leading the people and the Lord said this will only happen by prayer and I saw a new leader coming into Mexico. I don't know. What did Glenn Beck say? The power. Let them see it. Can we steal it and then we'll have to take it out? You can't keep it. But for the people, they want to see it. I like Glenn Beck. The drought that we are in, they believe that by the end of summer, if things don't change, we will be in the drought of 1610. The drought of 1610 was the breaking point. Nobody could grow anything. I saw a story about the Hoover Dam. When you look at the Hoover Dam that is providing, I think it's 25 million people with their electricity, mainly California and Nevada. To generate electricity, you need to have a lot of water behind that dam. If this doesn't correct itself, you're going to have major electricity shortages by 2027 or 2028. If we don't get miraculous rain here, California is in real trouble. The drought that we are in, they believe the Lord told us, remember I said in 2023, 'There is no water. There is no water. There is no water.' And we heard it three times. And the Lord said there was a new dust bowl coming. I saw a new dust bowl. And I saw the farmers for some reason left their tractors in the fields and they were all plowed up and there was dirt blowing everywhere. And I saw a great drought. And the Lord said, 'Weather warfare.' Weather manipulation. I saw weather manipulation and weather warfare concerning rain. Now, I don't understand that, but I saw it was weaponizing for great storms, great hail storms, huge hail storms and major hurricanes in certain places that would be catastrophic that they would have to make a new category of hurricane or tornado in the days ahead because of how big the tornadoes will become, weaponizing weather. And the Lord said, 'You must teach the people how to stand in their authority concerning weather, praying over the weather, and calling in the rain.' He's given us power and authority over the rain to tell the rain to come. We're facing drought in Oklahoma. We're facing drought all over the West. And there are some places that have got more rain than others, but we need a lot more. We're just a couple of weeks away from summer, and it will be very, very hot and dry without the rain. We need it now. So, we've been calling it in. Call in the rain. Help me. Use your faith. Believe God for rain for the land. Can these bones live? It's symbolic. There's a drought in this church and the Lord's going to bring forth a rain. But as we were praying last night, he said, 'All it takes is a spark. All it takes is a little spark to light on fire. Watch.' And I saw a spark happening in Australia and in these places. And all of a sudden, Holy Ghost gasoline was poured on those sparks, on that fire, and it became a wildfire. And the Lord, we were praying forth a Holy Ghost tornado, a Holy Ghost whirlwind, a stirring, a major outpouring of the spirit of the Lord, a stirring in the churches, a great move of the Holy Spirit with songs and worship like we've never heard. Sounds from heaven, sounds from the throne room of God. It's time for Holy Spirit music like it was when they wrote the old hymnals. Those are still really good. I sing them all the time. Not trying to get a Dove Award, trying to get just a 'Well done, thy good and faithful servant.' You brought worship and you worshiped me. It wasn't about getting a multi-million dollar contract. When you lose yourself in worship and it's all about him, that's what he's looking for. What are you doing? That fly. What are you doing whenever you're worshiping? Are you singing for praise of man or are you singing to give him praise? Where is your heart at when you're worshiping? What are you thinking about? You might have just gotten a cup of coffee from somebody. I don't know. God, I just want to praise you for it. I'm talking to myself. You got to stop and give him praise. Father, I thank you for the breakthroughs. I thank you, Father. I thank you, Lord. I'm not moved by the struggles for whatever it may be. But I don't give lip service or praise to the devil by telling the devil did this today, the devil did that. You know, it's one of those days. Well, don't give your attention to the enemy and what he's doing. Give God praise for how he's keeping you, for he's the God on the mountain and he's still the God in the valley. All right. Next. It has been assumed that—okay, so they're saying that they don't believe that you can get the virus unless you're in close contact with somebody. An expert now suggests it's possible it may be more contagious than thought. So did I read that wrong, son? No, they're saying close contact with someone having symptoms. You got more contagious. It would try to do things in 2028. Now we're in 2026. We're early, right? It was the end of 2027 going into 2028 like they did COVID, and I believe this is a trial run. I don't believe this is it. I just don't. And when I keep praying over it, I feel like it's going to die out and it'll go away. It's not going to be. This is with the mice. It's with the rats supposedly. Now, the Lord showed us that it would be in Europe. And it would start in Europe and it would spread all over Europe. Could this be the beginning of it? Could be. But do I feel like this is the main show? No. There's something more. Could I be wrong? Yes. So, I just keep praying over it. You keep praying over it with me. And I'm telling you all, I've seen something so much more once you get it. There was no—for what they were trying to do with this genetic mutation of this. It was fatal instantaneously. If you got it, you didn't last but a couple of hours, a couple of days. You're gone. And so, it's very—people say it scares me. I'm not—like I said, it's time to get a backbone. We have to get in the word. We have to. Fear will torment you and dominate your thoughts and it will run you ragged. Fear, the Bible says it: 'Fear has torment.' 'Fear is torment.' For fear has torment, but perfect love casteth out all fear. Meditate on today if you're in fear about a lot of things: all the stuff you're seeing, gas prices, food shortages, the weather, and you know, 'Oh God, the sky is falling.' Meditate on the love of God today. You have to meditate on the love. How much does my Father love me? 1 Corinthians 13. And you go over that. You go perfect love cast 1 John. Beloved, let us love one another. For love is of God, and everyone that loveth is born of God and knoweth God. He that loveth not knoweth not God, for God is love. Beloved, let us love one another. God is love. Meditate on the love of God. Love will drive fear out the door. Meditate on love today. Well, I've heard that we're in a recession. Well, there's a lot of people calling a recession. The new guy took over tomorrow. He's supposed to be sworn in by the end of the week. He's supposed to take Jerome Powell's job. He's supposed to be looking for a new job. The new guy takes over. So I guess they're going to vote after she talks to him. I don't know what all this is about, but they're supposed to have that all on Thursday. So Thursday is a busy day. So the new guy gets voted in on Thursday. Correct. Yeah. So all these three major things on Thursday, from what I understand: Clarity and all this other. So what's going on on the same day? Will it happen that way? I don't know. Will there be a delay? I don't know. I just think it's kind of interesting. I just watch. Okay, is that it? See right there: Jerome Powell's term as Fed chair ends Thursday, May 15th, with Kevin to be confirmed. See, Thursday. So the alien thing on Thursday, this on Thursday, and the Clarity Act. Where's that? You show them that they vote on the Clarity Act. I believe it's Thursday or Friday. Thursday. Yeah, I think it was the 14th or something like that. Is it the 14th or 15th? Because May 15th is Thursday. So that actually will be tomorrow if they're going to vote. I had it on last night: May 14th. Okay. So tomorrow they're supposed to vote on the Clarity Act. Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday. So how is that on Thursday? They don't know their own days. I don't think they do. See? The 14th is Thursday. Yeah, they're saying Thursday the 15th. That guy got messed up. I looked it up and I said, 'Yeah, he definitely messed up.' The first time it was Thursday. Yes. So she wants to release it on Thursday and he's voting out on Friday. So is that Thursday the 15th or 14th? It doesn't matter. You all get the picture. It is a really busy week. That's all that matters, and we'll keep continuing to pray.
